cases.name: no-fence
cases.description: Leaves SKILL.md unchanged when no leading frontmatter fence exists.

cases.name: empty-metadata-block
cases.description: Adds `metadata.version` using the default two-space indent when the metadata block is empty.

cases.name: existing-metadata-version
cases.description: Replaces an existing `metadata.version` value in place.

cases.name: shadowing-top-level-version
cases.description: Removes a shadowing top-level `version:` key and writes `metadata.version` instead.

cases.name: crlf-line-endings
cases.description: Captures the reference output for CRLF frontmatter input exactly as emitted by the Rust oracle.

cases.name: metadata-indent-four-spaces
cases.description: Inserts `metadata.version` using the indentation of the metadata block's first child.

cases.name: folded-description-before-version
cases.description: Updates `metadata.version` without disturbing a folded `description:` block above it.

cases.name: idempotent-already-reconciled
cases.description: Re-running reconciliation against already-correct bytes yields the same byte stream.
